transcript.text:
The video was taken before the spread of the Corona19 Virus. We are fully aware of the seriousness of the situation and we are currently refraining from filming outdoors in order for it to not adversely affect further spread. We wish for a speedy recovery for those affected.
Tzuyang x Exos Heroes
I am a character on a mobile game
This is my normal appearance
And I transform whenever I use skills
Why don't you design your own character with your viewers?
*Fan's Ideas -> Tzuyang's Drawings
About this many submissions
*Around 500 submissions
1st: 500,000 won (~$414 USD) 2nd: 300,000 won (~$248 usd) 3rd: 200,000 won (~$165 USD)
And a meal with Tzuyang!
*After the announcement of the winners..!
Hello~
*Meeting the 3 winners
Hello!
I got 3rd place!

*3rd:
I got 2nd place
*2nd:
I'm the 1st place winner
*1st:
Should we start eating?
You guys didn't eat yet, right?
You guys must be hungry
Beef..?
*So happy just from the word "beef"
2 of the Assorted Beef Combo,
1 Steak Tartare,
And 2 of the Kimchi Stew, please
Also this one too
*Memory card overload
Soy Sauce Marinated Crabs?

1 order?
No way. 4 orders.
Steak Tartare too
*Busy..
For how many people?
4 people
4 of you girls are eating all of this?
*To be exact: it's 3 normal girls and 1 Tzuyang alien
*Proper attitude towards receiving food
Soy Sauce Marinated Crabs
I will cook the meat for you girls
*Let's get this party started!
*This would be a regular meal
*Time to eat!
*Introduction of our 1st place winner's design
My first video of Tzuyang was when she volunteered to help out the firefighters

So I wanted to put some meaning into my design
*Tzuyang cooking for the firefights on a holiday
So water is directly related to firefighters
*Simulation #1:
*Zombies
*I will soak all of you!
*I'm thirsty
*Time to fuel!
*Zombies, get in line
*2nd place:
The people playing the game might not know Tzuyang
So I got the idea from Tzuyang's most-viewed video on Youtube
*Whole Steamed Pork Mukbang 7m views
I thought it'd be nice to attack with the pork
You also get really cute when you're drunk
*Once the alcohol goes in,

*Wink Wink
So that kind of stuff would be an attack
*Simulation #2
*Pretending it to be alcohol
*Cuteness
*Very effective..
*3rd place:
There was a time you wore a dinosaur costume
And I thought that was extremely cute
*Tzuranosaurus Mukbang
You have the table bell on your waist
and the tong will be the weapon
*Simulation #3
Excuse me, change of grill please!
Also very effective..
My husband has to go to work, so he needs to leave the baby with me

*Used a half-day to watch his wife film for a bit
So the character patch for the game has been released
So we're going to check them out together!
*Thank you for all the submissions!
*Conference room after eating
It's a very competitive environment
*Let's play with the baby
We were not able to apply all of the costumes features
We liked the concept of the "costume"
So we decided to use it as a skill
For our 2nd place,
*Mommy's!
It's going to be fun!
The video will play in a bit!
The idea of the skewers falling from the sky
*Undivided Attention

we used that to combine our 3rd place winner's ideas
Let's see it for ourselves
Shall we?
*Surprised
*Hey, it's me!
*Tzuranosaurus+Chicken Skewer Collaboration
Tzuyang eats the meat to get the energy
And heals her allies
*I thought mommy was only good at making my food
It's fun, right?
*Let's watch the next one
We were planning on making skills just for our 1st place winner,
But we really loved our 2nd and 3rd place winner's ideas
So we went out of our way to make that happen
Thank you
The reason why this is our 1st place winner

is because it's not just simply focused on Mukbang Youtuber Tzuyang
But it also shows her true character and personality
I thought it was very appropriate for this
That is the reason why this is our #1 pick
The drawing is also very good
The skill explanation really helped us understand the concept
We use all of the ideas
and Tzuyang drew the character herself
I saw her draw it. She did it all.
Oh no~
You didn't!?
*Tzuyang's creation: Tzuyang Firefighter
*Tzuyang's transformation characters
So here are the skills
*Tzuyang's Plum Juice Fuel
*Everyone with the same reaction

*That's not bad at all!
We were able to finish this project thanks to our 3 winners
*The result of everyone's time and effort
*I enjoyed it
She's excited
You love it, right?
We as designers also made Tzuyang's skills
Delivery app! You remembered!
*From a previous meeting
Tzuyang takes out her phone and says "what should I eat today?"
And she says "Delivery Please!"
Delivery please!
*I love that idea
That was very cool
Do the "Tzuyang" one
Oh, I'm not sure if I have that

*The skills that did not make the cut
Who in the right mind would make this?
Who are you to say? You guys are all crazy
This is a resurrection skill
You use it when all of your allies are dead
*Let's watch
*That's a bit... weird
*1st place of the character creation contest
*End of Meeting
This is the list of what you need to record
You have to sound it like you're actually hitting or getting hit
Let's head in now
*Tzuyang has entered the chat
Let's do the normal skills first
The duration is very short
*Worried

It's my first time doing anything like this
We will show you how it's supposed to be done
*Got it?
"Ho-it. Yat~!" is the most important one
Ho-it. Yat!
Let's go
*Not satisfied
That's so weird
You have to think to yourself that you're crazy
Here you go! Heres you go!
I really can't do it..
You have to be cheerful
Here you go!
You need to be hurt for this one
Have you ever been hit?
*Example

Just like that
*Silence..
Should we try a different one?
This one's very hard
You're shy right now, right? Yes, it's embarrassing
You need to let yourself go. Be confident
Just like how you are on TV programs
I'm not confident on shows either
*Recharging
"Please take it!" and we'll end it
I think that is the last line
Please, take it!
One more time!
Can you be more high-toned and cheerful?
You can do it!
*Want me to do that...?

Ah that's delicious! Nom Nom Nom
Making sound of eating meat is hard, right?
*Like this?
Yes, that's it!
*Really..?
I can't do this
Mukbang Start!
It tastes delicious!
You need to bring the energy up a notch,
Mukbang Start!
It tastes delicious!
Let's raise it up 1 more notch
Mukbang Start!
It tastes delicious!
Good good
Do you not say this in your mukbangs?

I always say "Thanks everyone"
Okay, just do it like how you say it in mukbangs
Thanks everyone~!
That's it for today's mukbang!
I love this one
She likes ending it. She ended it.
Are we done?
Yay, thank you
We're going to do our best to make the game look great! Fighting!
*A special thanks to all the submissions and support. Thank you Space Company!
*You can now use Tzuyang's Fate Cores on Exos Heroes!
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
